name: Cortex Memory
description: Layered semantic memory with L0/L1/L2 tiered retrieval for OpenClaw agents

defaultSessionId.description: Default session ID for memory operations (defaults to 'default')

minScore.description: Minimum relevance score for search results

tenantId.description: Tenant ID for data isolation. Switches the service to the specified tenant on startup.

serviceUrl.label: Service URL
serviceUrl.description: The HTTP endpoint of your cortex-mem-service instance

defaultSessionId.label: Default Session
defaultSessionId.description: Session ID to use when no thread is specified

searchLimit.label: Search Limit
searchLimit.description: Maximum number of results to return from search

minScore.label: Minimum Score
minScore.description: Filter results below this relevance threshold

tenantId.label: Tenant ID
tenantId.description: Tenant identifier for data isolation (default: tenant_claw)
